case_title: AARON SINELNIKOFF VS. EDMOND BEDROSSIAN D.D.S., INC.

PARTIES WILL NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. MATTER TO BE HEARD ON SEPT-30-2019 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 206. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON, CLERK M. JONES, NOT REPORTED. (506)

MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF SEP-30-2019. ***CASE DISMISSED.*** NO APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT ORDERS THE CASE DISMISSED. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

NOT REPORTED. SMALL CLAIMS TRIAL HELD ON OCT-28-2019, IN DEPT. 303. PLAINTIFF AARON SINELNIKOFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EDMOND BEDROSSIAN, D.D.S., IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF TAKES NOTHING. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: NEWTON LAM; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 303.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINELNIKOFF, AARON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EDMOND BEDROSSIAN D.D.S., INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
